memoryArtifacts.headline: Will of Thomas Merveyn 1454-1503 9H8X-RHH and his son John Mervyn 1480-1533 M5JY-R6S
Essex England 1900 era
memoryArtifacts.description:
The heavy line from Harwich ends at the southwest "corner" Which was the home of Edward Marvin.
"Spinels" adjoined it on the west. Spinels, Ramsey and Great Bentley are underlined.  "Sturwood" and East Hall" are near the Harwich Branch RR on the south bank of the Stour.

popularStory.headline: The Will of John Mervyn
popularStory.description: The Will of John Mervyn of Ramesey County Essex England a yeoman dated 16 Sept 1533.  I desire to be buried in the Church of St Michael the Archangel at Ramsey near my father and bequeath to that Chur …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Mervyn於大約1480年出生在英國艾可拉姆齊時，他的父親Thomas Mervyn28歲，母親Christian24歲。他於1499年與Margaret在英國艾可拉姆齊結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於從1533年9月16日到1533年12月17日在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可拉姆齊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Mervyn于大约1480年出生在英国艾可拉姆齊时，他的父亲Thomas Mervyn28岁，母亲Christian24岁。他于1499年与Margaret在英国艾可拉姆齊结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于从1533年9月16日到1533年12月17日在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可拉姆齊。

nameMeanings.name: Mervyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Marvin
meanings: English (mainly Leicestershire and Lincolnshire): from the Middle English personal name Merefin, Merevin, Old English Merefin. This is probably formed with Old English mere ‘sea’ + Finn (a personal name derived from the ethnic name). Alternatively, it may be a borrowing of an unrecorded Old Norse name Møra-Finnr.
Slovenian: nickname from marvin, the name of a tart light red wine.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Mervyn was born about 1480, in Ramsey, Essex, England, his father, Thomas Mervyn, was 28 and his mother, Christian, was 24. He married Margaret in 1499, in Ramsey, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died from 16 September 1533 to 17 December 1533, in his hometown, and was buried in Ramsey, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Mervyn est né environ 1480, à Ramsey, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Mervyn, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Christian, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret en 1499, à Ramsey, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé du 16 septembre 1533 au 17 décembre 1533, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Ramsey, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Mervyn um 1480 in Ramsey, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Mervyn 28 und seine Mutter Christian 24. Er hat 1499 in Ramsey, Essex, England Margaret geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb von 16. September 1533 bis 17. Dezember 1533 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ramsey, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Mervyn è nato il circa 1480 nel Ramsey, Essex, England, il suo padre, Thomas Mervyn, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Christian, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Margaret nel 1499, nel Ramsey, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì da 16 settembre 1533 a 17 dicembre 1533, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Ramsey, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.from 16 September 1533 to 17 December 15: から1533年9月16日まで1533年12月17日
ja.Ramsey, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスラムセイ
ja.lifeSummary: John Mervynが約1480年にイギリスエセックスラムセイで生まれた時，父Thomas Mervynは28歳，母Christianは24歳であった。1499年にイギリスエセックスラムセイでMargaretと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼はから1533年9月16日まで1533年12月17日に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスラムセイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Mervyn(이)가 대략 1480년 영국 에세스 램지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Mervyn(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1499년 영국 에세스 램지에서 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1533년 9월 16일부터 1533년 12월 17일까지 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 램지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Mervyn nasceu aproximadamente 1480, em Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Mervyn, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Christian, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret em 1499, em Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu de 16 de setembro de 1533 a 17 de dezembro de 1533, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Mervyn родился около 1480 г. в местности рамси, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Mervyn было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret в 1499 г. в местности рамси, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер с 16 сентября 1533 по 17 декабря 1533 в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности рамси, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Mervyn nació aproximadamente 1480, en Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Mervyn, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Christian, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Margaret en 1499, en Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió desde 16 de septiembre de 1533 hasta 17 de diciembre de 1533, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
